reef_city.setting:
You are a Knight of Pearl on Dasani. Humans are secretly stealing Aquarium-235. 
Do you (1) investigate the human research facility or (2) patrol the Mecha Whale Shark transit line?

transit.setting:
You patrol the transit line and spot a Shark mercenary smuggling Aquarium-235!
Do you (1) confront the smuggler or (2) call for backup?

facility.setting:
You sneak into the human research facility. A rogue Shark guard spots you!
Do you (1) stand your ground or (2) attempt a preemptive strike?

boss_fight.setting: The enemy charges at you! Prepare for battle!

ending_coward.setting: You wait for backup, but the smuggler escapes. Dasani remains at risk. GAME OVER.
